explanations.1: This creates a directed graph object (digraph means the edges have arrows showing direction) using the pydot library, which is a tool for drawing diagrams.
explanations.22: We're creating an Edge object on-the-fly and immediately adding it to the graph; the label parameter adds text to the arrow showing the decision rule.
explanations.30: This writes the graph visualization to a PNG image file on disk; pydot handles converting the graph structure into an actual picture.
